patterns.database_pattern: Room database with DAO pattern - will create AppDatabase as single source of truth
patterns.repository_pattern: Repository provides reactive streams (Flow) of sync state, observes both network and outbox
patterns.ui_pattern: Composable ViewBinding with StateFlow observation, collapsed/expanded states based on sync status
patterns.worker_pattern: WorkManager with ExistingPeriodicWorkPolicy.KEEP for background sync, triggered by network availability

existing_implementations.description: Greenfield Android project - gradle setup exists but no app code yet. Need to create from scratch following Android best practices.

architecture_notes.offline_first: Spec mentions CLAUDE.md defines offline-first with outbox pattern - all operations write to local DB first, then WorkManager drains to server
architecture_notes.sync_states: Three states: Offline (amber, shows N pending), Syncing (blue, progress animation), Online+Synced (green dot, collapsed)
architecture_notes.network_awareness: Use ConnectivityManager.NetworkCallback to monitor network state changes in real-time
